message:
bd-3uuf: Add unit tests for session_index core behaviors

Comprehensive test coverage for session_index.rs:
- index_session no-op for in-memory sessions
- index_session inserts/updates rows and meta.last_sync_epoch_ms
- list_sessions newest-first ordering
- list_sessions cwd filter functionality
- reindex_all rebuilds from disk
- reindex_all handles missing root gracefully
- should_reindex/reindex_if_stale staleness logic
- Error handling for unreadable/empty JSONL files
- Lock behavior (basic + concurrent access)
- SessionMeta field population verification
- Nested directory support
- Non-JSONL file filtering

16 focused tests covering happy paths and error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
